input.user_input: Replace the boilerplate merger clause in Section 12 with a more specific integration clause that references the attached exhibits and prior term sheet.

actual:
It looks like you haven't uploaded or attached the document you would like me to edit. 

Please upload the agreement, and I will gladly replace Section 12 for you. 

In the meantime, if you are drafting this yourself, here is an example of a specific integration clause that incorporates exhibits and a prior term sheet:

**Section 12. Entire Agreement**
> This Agreement, together with all Exhibits attached hereto and the Term Sheet entered into by the Parties on [Date], constitutes the sole and entire agreement of the Parties with respect to the subject matter contained herein. This Agreement supersedes all prior and contemporaneous understandings, agreements, representations, and warranties, both written and oral, with respect to such subject matter other than the aforementioned Term Sheet. In the event of any inconsistency between the statements in the body of this Agreement, the Exhibits, and the Term Sheet, the statements in the body of this Agreement shall control.

Once you provide the document, I can tailor this clause to match your exact defined terms and insert it directly into the text.
